items.name: MOLLE Large Pack with Frame (CIF Issue)
items.description: CIF-issued MOLLE large pack with cut-away shoulder straps and frame
items.whyNeeded: Primary rucksack for all field operations during ARSOF BLC. CIF issue mandatory.
items.selectionTips: CIF issue only. Cut-away shoulder straps are specifically required. Break it in before arriving.

recommendedProducts.name: ALICE Large Field Pack with Frame
recommendedProducts.reason: A civilian tactical ruck (Taylor style) is also on the optional list. The external frame remains the proven standard for ARSOF ruck weights across Camp Mackall terrain.

items.name: Field Load Carrying (FLC)
items.description: CIF-issued fighting load carrier with mag pouches
items.whyNeeded: Required for all tactical field operations during ARSOF BLC.
items.selectionTips: Must hold at least 6 magazines on the FLC per the official packing list.

items.name: Sleep System (Inner + Outer Bag)
items.description: USGI modular sleep system — both inner and outer bags
items.whyNeeded: Field exercises at Camp Mackall require a full sleep system. Outer bag required Oct–Mar.
items.selectionTips: Inner bag rated 30°F, combined system to -10°F.

recommendedProducts.name: USGI Modular Sleep System (MSS)
recommendedProducts.reason: The Army-standard modular system used at Camp Mackall. Works as-is for ARSOF BLC field phases across any season.

items.name: Gore-Tex Bivy Cover
items.description: CIF-issued waterproof bivy cover
items.whyNeeded: Protects sleep system from North Carolina's unpredictable rain.
items.selectionTips: Check seams for serviceability before arrival. Any Gore-Seam equivalent is authorized.

items.name: Poncho Liner and Poncho (x2)
items.description: CIF-issued camouflage poncho (2) and poncho liner
items.whyNeeded: Primary field shelter and rain protection. The poncho liner is one of the most versatile field items in the Army.
items.selectionTips: Both items are CIF issue. Poncho liner (woobie) is mandatory, not optional, for ARSOF BLC.

items.name: Canteens (1QT x2 and 2QT x2)
items.description: CIF-issued canteens with covers, plus CamelBak
items.whyNeeded: Continuous hydration is essential during field operations at Camp Mackall.
items.selectionTips: CamelBak must be black, green, ACU, or OCP pattern with 100 oz bladder.

recommendedProducts.name: CamelBak BFM 3L Hydration Pack
recommendedProducts.reason: Mandatory CamelBak for ARSOF BLC. Hands-free 3L keeps you hydrated through long field days without fumbling for canteens during tactical movement.

items.name: Gore-Tex Parka and Trousers (PCU Level 6)
items.description: CIF-issued Gore-Tex wet weather jacket and trousers
items.whyNeeded: Required for October through March classes. Gore-Seam equivalent authorized.
items.selectionTips: If Gore-Tex unavailable, Army wet weather suit replaces it. Verify with parent unit CIF.

items.name: Entrenching Tool with Carrier
items.description: CIF-issued folding entrenching tool (E-tool) with carrier
items.whyNeeded: Required for field operations. Fighting positions and patrol bases require digging.
items.selectionTips: Ensure blade is sharpened and hinge is tight before arriving.

items.name: OCP/Multicam Uniform Sets
items.description: 4 tops and 4 trousers minimum. Name tape, rank, US Army, and unit patch required
items.whyNeeded: All uniforms worn IAW AR 670-1. Patrol caps require cat-eyes, nametape, and VS-17 panel sewn on.
items.selectionTips: Sew cat-eyes on patrol caps before arrival. VS-17 panel is a unique ARSOF BLC requirement.

items.name: Combat Boots (AR 670-1 Compliant)
items.description: 2 pairs minimum — hot weather and/or intermediate cold
items.whyNeeded: Field operations at Camp Mackall demand proven, well-broken-in boots.
items.selectionTips: No zippers or hook/pile fasteners. Sole replacement (waffle soles) is authorized.

recommendedProducts.name: Garmont T8 NFS Tactical Boot
recommendedProducts.reason: AR 670-1 compliant, fast-drying, and lighter than full leather. Ideal for ARSOF BLC's combination of classroom and field operations at Camp Mackall.

items.name: Wool Socks (Green or Black)
items.description: 6 pairs minimum
items.whyNeeded: Moisture-wicking wool socks are mandatory IAW the official packing list. Prevent blisters and trench foot.
items.selectionTips: Darn Tough. Bring more than 6 pairs. Change socks every field day.

recommendedProducts.name: Darn Tough Boot Full Cushion Sock
recommendedProducts.reason: Merino wool stays warm even when wet and dries fast — critical for Camp Mackall's variable climate. Lifetime guarantee means you'll never buy socks again.

items.name: PCU Cold Weather Layers (Levels 1-3 + 6)
items.description: Silk underwear (L1), waffle underwear (L2), fleece jacket (L3), Gore-Tex parka/trousers (L6)
items.whyNeeded: Full PCU cold weather system required for October–March classes.
items.selectionTips: Green or brown PCU L3 fleece only. Required during cold-weather field operations.

items.name: Army PT Uniform (Complete)
items.description: 2 black SS shirts, 1 LS shirt, 2 gold-letter trunks, 1 black pants, 1 black jacket
items.whyNeeded: Required for all PT formations during ARSOF BLC.
items.selectionTips: Black Army PT brand only. No non-issued PT clothing.

items.name: Leather Gloves (Black or Green) with Wool Inserts
items.description: 1 pair leather gloves + 2 pairs wool liner inserts
items.whyNeeded: Hand protection during cold field operations. No white gloves authorized.
items.selectionTips: Wool inserts are required separately from the leather outer glove.

recommendedProducts.name: Military Leather Gloves with Wool Insert
recommendedProducts.reason: AR 670-1 compliant leather gloves with wool inserts — the exact combination required in the ARSOF BLC packing list.

items.name: Notebooks with Pen and Pencil (Large & Small)
items.description: Large (min 6"x9") and small (min 3"x5") notebooks — sterile (no pre-existing notes)
items.whyNeeded: ARSOF BLC is an academically rigorous leadership course. Sterile notebooks required for OPSEC.
items.selectionTips: Waterproof notebooks strongly recommended. Both large and small sizes required.

recommendedProducts.name: Rite in the Rain All-Weather Notebook
recommendedProducts.reason: Waterproof pages required for field note-taking. Available in both large and small formats to satisfy the ARSOF BLC requirement.

items.name: Headlamp with Red Lens + Extra Batteries
items.description: Tactical headlamp with red filter and full spare battery set
items.whyNeeded: Night operations and tactical movement require a reliable light with red filter for night vision preservation.
items.selectionTips: Extra batteries mandatory per packing list. Standard AAs strongly preferred.

recommendedProducts.name: Princeton Tec Remix Pro Headlamp
recommendedProducts.reason: Multiple brightness modes and 300+ hour runtime on AAs. Trusted by ARSOF units for field reliability and night vision-preserving red mode.

items.name: Personal Hygiene Kit (3-Week Supply)
items.description: Razors (3+ with blades), toothbrush/paste, soap, deodorant, shaving cream
items.whyNeeded: Limited shopette access during ARSOF BLC. Bring enough for the full course.
items.selectionTips: 3 razors with blades minimum. Deodorant and soap required. No protein powder or supplements.

items.name: Running Shoes (Serviceable)
items.description: 1 pair of serviceable running shoes
items.whyNeeded: Required for PT runs and morning formations.
items.selectionTips: Well broken-in before arriving. HOKA or Brooks for maximum cushioning.

recommendedProducts.name: HOKA Clifton 9 Running Shoe
recommendedProducts.reason: Maximum cushioning reduces fatigue during PT after long field days. Used by ARSOF candidates to protect joints during high-mileage training.

items.name: Weapons Cleaning Kit
items.description: Small arms cleaning kit capable of cleaning entire assigned weapon
items.whyNeeded: Weapons maintenance is a daily responsibility at ARSOF BLC. Kit must be complete.
items.selectionTips: Bring cleaning rags separately. Q-tips listed as optional for detailed cleaning.

items.name: Wristwatch (No GPS or Smart Features)
items.description: Durable mechanical or digital watch
items.whyNeeded: Required for timing patrol operations and coordinating with other elements. Activity trackers prohibited.
items.selectionTips: No GPS, no Bluetooth, no activity tracking. Casio G-Shock is the standard NCO choice.

items.name: Map Case with Map Markers
items.description: Field map case with dry-erase markers
items.whyNeeded: Land navigation and operations planning require a waterproof map case with marking capability.
items.selectionTips: Subdued colors. Alcohol pens are on the optional list as well.

items.name: Ballistic Eye Protection (Clear, ANSI Z87.1+)
items.description: Ballistic-rated clear lens protective eyewear
items.whyNeeded: Required for all weapons ranges and tactical exercises.
items.selectionTips: ANSI Z87.1 or better. Contact lenses not authorized.

items.name: Leatherman Multi-Tool
items.description: Quality multi-tool for field and weapons maintenance
items.selectionTips: Leatherman Wave or Signal. Used constantly during field operations and weapons maintenance.

recommendedProducts.name: Leatherman Wave+ Multi-Tool
recommendedProducts.reason: 25 tools in 8.5 oz. The standard multi-tool across all ARSOF units — weapons maintenance, gear repair, and field first-aid all handled.

items.name: Knee Pads and Elbow Pads
items.description: Field-grade protective pads
items.selectionTips: Useful for patrol exercises and live-fire drills. OCP or subdued color only.

items.name: Civilian Rucksack (Tactical/Taylor Style)
items.description: Aftermarket military-style rucksack
items.selectionTips: Optional secondary ruck. Tactical Taylor or similar quality. Must be subdued color.

items.name: Knife (Max 3" Blade, Folding Preferred)
items.description: Folding or pocket knife within authorized dimensions
items.selectionTips: Shorter max blade (3") than SUT. Folding/pocket style preferred.

items.name: Electronic Devices
items.description: MP3 players, laptops, e-readers, cameras, GPS watches, activity trackers, e-cigs
items.notes: Cell phones are turned in Day-1 and secured in a zip-lock bag. All other electronic devices not on the authorized list are prohibited.

items.name: Supplements and Protein Powder
items.description: Any supplement not prescribed by a military physician
items.notes: Students will not have any type of supplements. No protein powder, pre-workout, or performance supplements authorized.

items.name: Under Armour / Printed T-Shirts
items.description: Compression shirts, Under Armour, shirts with logos or designs
items.notes: Army-issue T-shirts only. Under Armour-type compression shirts and shirts with any printed logos or designs are prohibited.

items.name: Civilian GPS Devices
items.description: Any civilian GPS unit or GPS-capable smartwatch
items.notes: No civilian GPS of any kind allowed. No GPS watches or activity trackers.
